arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk & Frenkie de Jong forced to withdraw from Netherlands squad 'on medical grounds'
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk and Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong were both forced to withdraw from the Dutch squad.

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Virgil van Dijk makes early Reds return from international duty 'on medical grounds'
arts.sum: Alongside Frenkie de Jong, Dutch captain will not play in Tuesday’s final Nations League group clash in Bosnia and Herzegovina

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk leaves Netherlands squad and returns to Liverpool 'on medical grounds'
arts.sum: Dutch captain Van Dijk, along with Barcelona midfielder Frenkie de Jong, have both been allowed to return to their clubs after starting in Saturday's 4-0 win over Hungary in Amsterdam
Virgil van Dijk is released from the Netherlands squad before their Nations League match against Bosnia-Herzegovina.

arts.ttl: Van Dijk and De Jong out of Netherlands squad
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk and Frenkie de Jong have withdrawn from the Netherlands squad ahead of Tuesday night's UEFA Nations League clash with Bosnia and Herzegovina.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk returning to Liverpool after leaving Netherlands squad on 'medical grounds'
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk withdraws from international duty ahead of Liverpool's visit to Southampton on Sunday

Bosnia and Herzegovina's fourth-placed finish in UEFA Nations League group A3 was confirmed with Saturday's 7-0 defeat to Germany. The Netherlands, meanwhile, all but sealed their progression to the ...

arts.ttl: Nike to End Netherlands Kit Deal?
arts.sum: Nike's deal with the Royal Netherlands Football Federation (KNVB) is set to expire at the end of 2026.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk's former teammate picks out ideal replacement for Liverpool captain
arts.sum: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk is out of contract at the end of the season but the Reds have been told who would be the best fit to replace the Dutch centre-back

arts.ttl: Dutch icon slams Frenkie de Jong focus after Netherlands return
arts.sum: Barcelona star Frenkie de Jong has received a show of support from Dutch icon Marco van Basten. De Jong has endured a miserable year with injuries threatening to derail his career for club and country as he battled back to full fitness.
